judge_result.short_rationale: The core eye-rinsing and contact-lens steps are correct and in the right order, and the do-not-stop warning is grounded. However, the escalation was overgeneralized to unconditional medical attention instead of the source condition that care is needed if symptoms persist after rinsing or exposure was substantial.
